ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Verbal Award for PACS service line.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "Post Acute Care Services Opportunity" && ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Verbal Award") && (ISNULL(Verbal_Award_Date__c) || ISNULL(Expected_Sign_Date__c) || ISNULL(Target_Contract_Start_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Verbal Award Date, Expected Sign Date and Target Contract Start Date.
